data.description:
Three verified doc/code mismatches that mislead agent consumers:
1. __init__.py:266 and mcp_server.py:360 document link relations as "blocks | depends_on | relates_to"; the engine accepts six (discovered_from/duplicates/supersedes verified to succeed; the invalid-relation error lists all six). CLAUDE.md's discovered_from workflow contradicts the library docstring.
2. mcp_server.py:4-5 claims reads "use the library's subprocess wrappers" — reads are in-process via _reads.py (its own docstring says so).
3. __init__.py:404-409 reconcile docstring says only "live mutates Jira" — bootstrap-strict/bootstrap-throttle mutate too (see bug said-stilt-brow / 9d7c-081b). Fix wording together with that gate fix.

Fix: correct all three; add a doc-conformance test for the relations list (source it from the engine's canonical relation set so it cannot drift again).
data.title: Doc drift: link relations docstrings list 3 of 6; mcp_server header claims subprocess reads; reconcile docstring understates mutating modes
